description: Evaluates change management service maturity—change request systems, business processes, KPIs/KRIs, policies by change type, CAB governance, impact analysis, baselines, deviation detection, exception handling, and service restoration.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A change management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Change management system
capabilities.description: Change management software generates change requests, covers the enterprise, supports automated approvals, and integrates with staging and risk management.
evaluation_focus: Integration with staging and risk management

capabilities.name: Change management business process
capabilities.description: A formalized change management process applies enterprise-wide, is automated, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Change management KPIs and KRIs are documented and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Change Management policy
capabilities.description: Formal change management policies for subject, network, endpoint, application, and data/database changes apply enterprise-wide and are reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Change approval Board (CAB)
capabilities.description: A change advisory board approves and denies change requests with enterprise-wide representation.

capabilities.name: Impact analysis and Quality Testing
capabilities.description: Impact analysis is mandated for major changes, supported by documented procedures, and automatable in CI/CD.
evaluation_focus: Impact analysis mandated for major changes

capabilities.name: Establish change baseline
capabilities.description: Change management baselines exist for all change request types and are monitored and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Baselines for all change request types

capabilities.name: Baseline deviation
capabilities.description: The SOC or visibility solution identifies deviations from change baselines automatically across the enterprise.

capabilities.name: Exception Management
capabilities.description: An exception management process handles changes that cannot undergo standard impact analysis, deployed enterprise-wide including cloud, with post-exception review.
evaluation_focus: Exception process for changes without impact analysis

capabilities.name: Restoration of business critical Services
capabilities.description: The enterprise can restore services after failed changes via documented processes, automation, and controller integration.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
